etymology.description: Depicts an ancient form of ťôį(ťôį) (yńęn, "shade") -> used as phonetic component
etymology.interpretation: šĺĆ(šĺĆ) (yńęn, "phonetic") is an ancient form of ťôį(ťôį) (yńęn, "shade") and serves as the phonetic component in the character ťôį(ťôį), which combines the meaning of the semantic ťėú(ťėú) (f√Ļ, "mound") with the phonetic value of šĺĆ(šĺĆ). It represents the phonetic value 'yńęn' but does not have a widely recognized standalone meaning.
